info.name: Unified AI Gateway - Full API
info.description: Comprehensive Postman collection for the Unified AI Gateway thesis project.

request.description: Start an OTP challenge for the demo user.
Verify the OTP and store the returned Sanctum token in the environment.
Fetch the authenticated user profile.
Update the authenticated user profile with a JSON payload.
Update the authenticated user profile image. Select a local image file if Postman does not resolve the placeholder path automatically.
List the current user's API clients.
Create a new API client and store its id.
List API keys for the selected API client.
Create a new API key. The plaintext key is stored in the environment as apiKey.
Revoke the selected API key.
Rotate the selected API key and update the stored apiKey variable.
Get the current wallet balance.
Increase the wallet balance so subscription and AI flows can be exercised.
List wallet transactions.
List subscription plans.
Create a sample subscription plan and store its id.
Create a subscription for the selected plan.
Fetch the current active subscription.
Cancel the current subscription.
List invoices and store the first invoice id and signed pdf URL when available.
Fetch invoice details and store its signed PDF URL.
Use the signed PDF URL returned by invoice detail.
Fetch grouped usage metrics.
Fetch wallet ledger entries.
Fetch invoice report entries filtered by status.
List provider records.
Create a provider record and store its id.
List models for the selected provider.
Create a provider model mapping and store its id.
OpenAI-compatible responses endpoint authenticated with Authorization Bearer apiKey.
OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint.
Embeddings endpoint authenticated with X-API-Key.
Image generation endpoint.
Audio transcription endpoint. Select a local audio file if Postman does not resolve the placeholder path automatically.
Text-to-speech endpoint. A binary audio response is expected.
Requires an authenticated user with the admin role.
